overall.description: Dark forest exploration sequence from a survival horror video game. A player character in an orange coat encounters wolves on a narrow dirt trail at night, then continues deeper into the dense woodland as the character moves off-screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with wildlife encounter

events.description: character in orange coat raises arms defensively as wolves approach from the right
character moves rapidly to the right and exits the frame while camera continues forward

agents.ego_description: player character in long orange coat walking cautiously along forest path, raising arms as wolves approach from the right side

notable_agents.action: wolf approaching the character aggressively from the right side of the path
wolf in foreground moving across the dirt path

entered.detail: player character wearing long orange coat and hat, visible from behind
low stone wall running along the right side of the forest path
dense forest canopy blocking the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, following a character in an orange coat from a third-person perspective. Two wolves appear - one in the immediate foreground and another approaching from the right near a stone wall. The character raises their arms defensively before moving rapidly right and exiting the frame as the camera continues forward along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest trail continuing into darkness

agents.ego_description: camera continues moving forward through the dark forest path after the character has exited the frame, navigating the narrow trail between dense trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding deeper into the dark forest with uneven terrain

segments.scene_description: The camera continues alone through the dense forest after the character exits the frame. The narrow dirt trail winds between thick trees and underbrush, with visibility limited to the path immediately ahead. The stone wall from the previous segment falls behind as the forest closes in, creating an enclosed, ominous atmosphere as the journey continues deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark forest trail that shifts from a tense encounter into a solitary, claustrophobic journey deeper into the woods. It begins by following a character in an orange coat who raises their arms defensively as two wolves emerge from the shadows, one in the foreground and another by a stone wall. As the character rapidly moves to the right and exits the frame, the camera continues its forward momentum alone along the narrow dirt path. The scene then shifts as the stone wall falls behind and the surrounding underbrush thickens, limiting visibility to the immediate trail ahead. Finally, the forest closes in around the camera, creating an enclosed and ominous atmosphere as it pushes further into the dense woodland.
